title: Arjunawiwaha: Arjuna's Wedding
description: The Javanese masterpiece: Arjuna meditates so deeply that the gods send celestial nymphs to tempt him.
introduction: The Javanese masterpiece: Arjuna meditates so deeply that the gods send celestial nymphs to tempt him.

translation.text: Arjuna sat motionless in meditation. The god Indra, alarmed, sent the most beautiful apsaras to break his concentration.
